# Pre-project

This chapter covers the BUSN 5000 Pre-project Exercise.

## Outline (to be written)

- Purpose of the pre-project
- What you'll produce (a 3-slide deck demonstrating setup)
- Step-by-step walkthrough
- Submission rubric (all-or-nothing 5 points; common formatting
  errors)
- Filename convention
- Common mistakes and how to avoid them

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is a stub. Content will be filled in as part of Wave 2
of the project rebuild.
:::
